description: Countly is a product analytics platform for web, mobile, desktop, and IoT applications, offered as self-hosted and cloud deployments. It focuses on usage analytics, performance/crash monitoring, engagement features, and privacy-conscious data ownership.
summary: Countly exposes a server-side HTTP API authenticated by a user API key, plus an official npm-distributed MCP server/CLI that connects to a Countly instance using a Countly auth token.
